title: Opening for Logistics Manager at Pickrr

jsonLd.title: Opening for Logistics Manager at Pickrr
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Pickrr! We are hiring a Logistics Manager for our Ghaziabad team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Pickrr:
Pickrr is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage relationships with third-party logistics providers
• Conduct periodic vendor audits and evaluate logistics partners
• Coordinate with customer service teams to resolve delivery issues
• Track shipments in real-time and resolve delivery exceptions
• Coordinate with warehousing teams for inbound and outbound operations
• Manage reverse logistics and return merchandise authorization
• Ensure compliance with transportation regulations and safety standards

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Com / M.Com / MBA Finance
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in WMS
• Proficiency in Data Analytics
• Proficiency in Reverse Logistics
• Proficiency in Freight Forwarding
• Proficiency in Fleet Management
• Proficiency in Last Mile Delivery
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management
• Proficiency in 3PL Management

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Learning & development budget
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Flexible working hours
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Ghaziabad, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Pickrr!
